official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound set_entity_data empty metadata body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_entity_data to packet id 0x63.
The generated fixture uses entity id 12345 and an empty packed metadata list.
The official empty packed metadata branch writes EOF marker byte 255 and does not enter SynchedEntityData.DataValue serializer payload decoding.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded entity id, decoded packed item count, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove entity existence, non-empty metadata, metadata serializers, metadata values, runtime entity state, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer entity existence, non-empty metadata, metadata serializers, metadata values, runtime entity state, or client-load completion.
